steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Count the relevant faces, dimensions, or scale factor before setting up equations. Lengths scale by $k$, areas by $k^2$, and volumes by $k^3$; for boxes and prisms, write the needed face or volume formula directly.

steps.title: Set up the volume formula for a right prism
steps.content:
For any prism, Volume = Base Area × Height. The base is a square with edge length 6, so:
$$\text{Base Area} = 6^2 = 36 \text{ square units}$$
Substituting into the volume formula:
$$2880 = 36 \times h$$

steps.title: Solve for height
steps.content: Divide both sides by 36: $$h = \frac{2880}{36} = 80 \text{ units}$$ That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
